title: Emmanuel Oyeleke Photography
description: Emmanuel Oyeleke, a visual artist, Tech Enthusiast and the Creative Director of Emmanuel Oyeleke Photography. Emmanuel Oyeleke is a Canon Ambassador and has won several awards in Nigeria and Africa including Future Awards Prize for Photography 2018 and The ASFA Fashion Photographer of the year (Africa)  2018, Fashions Finest Award for Fashion Photographer of the year 2019  and many others.

title: Elite Studio Nigeria
description: Elite Studio Nigeria is a boutique photography and videography media agency that is equipped with modern equipment, media experts, creative ideas, and technical know-how. We specialise in professional portraits, corporate headshots, wedding photography, event photography, product photography, 360-degree photos and videos, video production, training and more.

title: Poshclick Portraiture
description: I capture beautiful moments between couples & Families for future reflection. I'm a certified photographer based in the state of excellence, Lagos.

title: Pyragraph Studios
description: Pyragraph Studio is a professional photography outfit based in Lagos Nigeria, we specialize in digital imagery including but not limited to Portrait, Fashion, commercial, product and Events Photography.

title: Klala Photography
description: At Klala Photography, we believe in the power of storytelling through captivating images. Not only do we specialize in weddings, pre-weddings, family portraits, and 360 video booths, but we also excel in event video coverage, transforming fleeting moments into keepsakes that last a lifetime.

title: Ijeworks
description: Ijeworks Media is a multimedia company that tells visual stories. With our redefined images, we tell stories – the only reference in the present to the past, the only proof of what or who is, and the only string that keeps memories alive. We are driven to capture priceless moments in a creative way that is pleasing to the eye.
